title: InsertForce Property
description:
InsertForce Property

InsertForce Property

This property sets the pressing force in the direction of motion specified by the InsertOrient property for the force guide object during the execution of the force guide object.

If the InsertOrient is +Fx, +Fy, or +Fz:

Value (Unit: [N])

Minimum value -50

Maximum value 0

Default: -10

If the InsertOrient is -Fx, -Fy, or -Fz:

Value (Unit: [N])

Minimum value 0

Maximum value 50

Default: -10
